name: "This place sucks."
description:
-[ She's overworked and overwhelmed ]-

It's only a matter of time until I quit.

And before you guys say anything, no I'm not overworking myself, or if i'm taking long enough breaks

I'm just simply getting bored of using janitorai

and plus, I need to work on drawing more characters for EAC and stuff

Something something yeah

Tags: EAC, FPE, Essential Academic Community, College
creator: YetAnotherInternetUser
